title: We no speak Umbrellarino
description: Adds a holdable umbrella that slows your fall!
body:
# We No Speak Umbrellarino
A mod that adds umbrella! It is crafted from 2 carpets, 1 netherite ingot, and 2 iron ingots. It is used to slow down falling (similar to that of Slow Falling Potion). You can open and close it but if you tried to jump while having it open, it will make you jump lower.

![Created for ModFest: Singularity](https://blob.jortage.com/blobs/5/d4d/5d4d14d96db2e2024d87cf5606cb7ce6421633a002e328947f85d210ba250ecb9f86de8df210dd031be2d4eafb0980494e7a1e8e99590a550abaa42d82768b9f)


## Special Thanks
[@ami-wishes](https://github.com/ami-wishes) for helping with the Mixinless version of this
